overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked futuristic cyberpunk city street, featuring massive megastructures, elevated highways, and flying vehicles. The footage is clearly from a video game engine with high-fidelity graphics, atmospheric rain effects, and neon-lit architecture reminiscent of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass with multi-lane arterial road

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead from left to right above the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway with thick support pillars
towering futuristic megastructure with distinctive yellow and red geometric facade patterns
large illuminated advertising screen displaying commercial content
yellow concrete barriers separating the sidewalk from the multi-lane road
tall pole with multiple surveillance cameras and lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view from a sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure in a rain-soaked cyberpunk city. The camera moves forward steadily, revealing a towering megabuilding in the distance and a large digital billboard on the right. Flying vehicles pass overhead while ground traffic flows along the wet asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with prominent digital advertising

events.description: digital billboard on right becomes larger and more prominent as camera approaches
flying vehicle descends and passes overhead near the megabuilding

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk as the environment opens up to reveal commercial buildings

entered.detail: modern glass facade building supporting the large digital billboard

segments.scene_description: Moving past the initial underpass, the street opens to reveal a glass commercial building on the right with a prominent digital billboard. The elevated highway structure recedes into the background on the left while the megabuilding looms larger ahead. Flying vehicles navigate the airspace above the wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: megabuilding approach plaza with curved office complex

events.description: passing the digital billboard and entering the plaza area at the base of the megabuilding

agents.ego_description: approaching the base of the massive central megabuilding while passing commercial structures

entered.detail: modern curved glass building with illuminated interior levels on the left side

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the base of the massive megabuilding, having passed the digital billboard. A curved glass office building becomes prominent on the left, while the megabuilding's detailed facade fills more of the center frame. The elevated highway is now distant on the left as the camera moves through the plaza area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from beneath a heavy industrial underpass toward the imposing base of a futuristic megabuilding. It begins on a rain-soaked sidewalk under a massive elevated highway, moving steadily past flowing ground traffic and flying vehicles that navigate the airspace above. As the camera clears the underpass, the street opens up to reveal a glass commercial building and a prominent digital billboard on the right, while the highway structure recedes into the background. The scene then shifts toward a wide plaza area, passing the billboard to bring a curved glass office building into view on the left. Finally, the camera approaches the towering megabuilding, its detailed facade expanding to fill the center of the frame.
